homeLucky.bannerText1: Two play modes are live. Enter the packet hall to switch between thunder and parity.
homeLucky.bannerText2: New parity mode: send faster, then choose odd or even before grabbing.
homeLucky.bannerText3: Classic thunder mode remains available, so existing players can keep playing as usual.
homeLucky.sendQuickText: Open the packet hall, switch the mode there, and send under the selected rules.
homeLucky.playHubSub: Send from the top area or join active rounds in the packet stream. Both modes stay available.
homeLucky.playModeThunderDesc: Bomb mode: set the bomb tail digit when sending. Grabbing a matching tail digit results in a loss.
homeLucky.playModeThunderNote: Best for players already familiar with thunder rules.
homeLucky.playModeParityDesc: Only set the amount. Players choose odd or even before grabbing.
homeLucky.playModeParityNote: Faster to send and easier for new users to join.
homeLucky.parityChoiceSub: You are joining {user}'s parity packet. Pick odd or even before continuing.
homeLucky.loginDialogMsg: Please login or register to grab lucky packets.

packetListPage.entryTitle: Open the list page and filter packets by play mode
packetListPage.ruleContentThunder:
Bomb Mode Rules
- Entry Limit: 10 ~ 3000
- Participation Requirement: Your account balance must be at least 1.8 times the red envelope amount to join the grab.
- Bomb Number Setting: The sender can set any single digit from 0 to 9 as the bomb ending number.
- Reward & Penalty Rules
  1. Hit the Bomb: If the last digit of the amount you grabbed matches the bomb number, you shall pay 1.8 times the total red envelope amount to the sender.
  2. Avoid the Bomb: If the last digit does not match, all grabbed coins will be credited directly to your wallet.
packetListPage.ruleContentParity:
Odd & Even Mode Rules
- Entry Limit: 10 ~ 3000
- Participation Requirement: Your account balance must be at least 1.8 times the red envelope amount to participate.
- Game Selection: Choose odd or even in advance to predict the last digit of the red envelope amount.
- Win & Lose Rules
  1. Correct guess: Keep all grabbed coins.
  2. Wrong guess: Pay 1.8 times the grabbed amount to the sender automatically.
- Red Envelope Setting: Senders can freely set the total amount. The system will settle all profits and penalties automatically.

questionsPage.title: FAQ
questionsPage.footerHint: Didn't find the answer you need?

h1.a: It is a packet-grab game where users join send/grab rounds with thunder rules and settle by game rules.

h2.a: Go to Recharge page, choose a channel and amount, submit order, then complete payment.

h3.a: Go to Withdraw page, enter amount and submit. Funds are sent after approval.

h4.a: Recharge first, then choose packets on the home page to join grabbing.

h5.a: A thunder number is the tail-number rule used to determine thunder hits.

f1.a: Supported channels are those currently shown on the recharge page.

f2.q: Is there a minimum recharge amount?
f2.a: Yes. The minimum amount follows the options shown on the recharge page.

f3.a: Usually fast. It may be delayed during peak hours or risk review.

f4.a: Whether fees apply and the rate depend on the current withdraw page notice.

g1.a: Choose the thunder number when sending a packet.

g2.a: The system splits it into multiple random sub-packets by rule.

g3.a: It depends on whether a sub-packet tail number matches the thunder number.

g4.a: After thunder hit, amount is deducted and settled to the sender by current rules.

g5.q: Any other win/loss rules besides thunder?
g5.a: Platform fee and event rules may also affect result.

g6.q: Is there a fee for grabbing packets?
g6.a: If any fee applies, it will be shown on page; otherwise current rules apply.

g7.q: Is there a fee for sending packets?
g7.a: The platform may take commission from sender income. See page for current ratio.

g8.a: If not fully grabbed before timeout, it ends automatically.

s1.a: Do not share code/password/login info and beware of phishing links.

s2.a: Use Forgot Password on the login page and reset via email code.

s3.q: What if my account is stolen?
s3.a: Change password immediately and contact support.

s4.a: Enable via platform entry once the feature is available.

pwaInstall.title: Add to Home Screen
